positive: A stylized minimalist illustration featuring a bioluminescent forest scene, centered composition. The main subject is a group of elegant, stylized deer leaping through glowing flora and hanging vines. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, glowing lime green, and silver accents. The style should be clean vector art mixed with sophisticated watercolor washes, giving strong silhouettes against a darker background. Focus on high contrast and intricate detail in the leaf veins and glowing elements. Must be highly suitable for seamless apparel printing and visible on a t-shirt. Studio lighting setup, ultra high detail, graphic novel quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, deformed, noise, low detail, realistic photo, solid color background, messy, gradient, graffiti
